## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🔗 Related To

- Epic: #[epic-issue-number]
- Parent Issue: #[parent-issue-number]

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## 📊 Impact Assessment

**Priority:**

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

**Complexity:**

- [ ] Simple
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Complex

**Affected Modules:**

- [ ] Parent App
- [ ] Child App
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] AI Models
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Infrastructure

## 📈 User Story

**As a** [type of user]
**I want** [goal]
**So that** [reason/benefit]

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 📚 Additional Context

Add mockups, diagrams, or any other context.
